name: unit_converter_agent
description: A unit conversion agent that accurately converts between dozens of units of length, temperature, weight, volume, speed, and data storage — all computed locally with no external APIs.

skills.name: Length Conversion
skills.description: Convert between mm, cm, m, km, inches, feet, yards, miles, and nautical miles.

skills.name: Temperature Conversion
skills.description: Convert between Celsius, Fahrenheit, and Kelvin.

skills.name: Weight Conversion
skills.description: Convert between mg, g, kg, tonnes, ounces, pounds, stones, and short tons.

skills.name: Volume Conversion
skills.description: Convert between ml, liters, gallons, cups, pints, quarts, tablespoons, and more.
examples: How many cups in a quart?

skills.name: Speed Conversion
skills.description: Convert between m/s, km/h, mph, knots, and ft/s.

skills.name: Data Storage Conversion
skills.description: Convert between bytes, KB, MB, GB, TB, and PB.
